description_long: This is a rectangular, orange-tinted plastic juice bottle with a red screw cap and a clear front label. The front label displays the brand 'Enjoi' and highlights the juice flavor as carrot, orange, and mango, with vibrant fruit illustrations. The bottle has a smooth, slightly matte surface and is semi-transparent, allowing a hint of the juice color to show through. The back of the bottle features a nutritional information panel and additional branding. The sides of the bottle are plain, with no visible text or graphics. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for single-serving juice packaging.
description: A rectangular orange plastic juice bottle with a red screw cap, fruit illustrations, and clear branding on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Enjoi' brand, carrot-orange-mango flavor label, and fruit illustrations.
description_view_1: Side view with plain orange surface and no visible text or graphics.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the 'Enjoi' brand, nutritional information panel, and a small fruit illustration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, also plain orange with no visible text or graphics.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: carrot, orange, and mango fruit illustrations
